testcase.name: test_setup_listing_and_watchers
test_price_drop_creates_notification

failure.message: AssertionError: buyer unread should increase: 0 -> 0 assert 0 > 0

testcase.name: test_analytics_overview
testcase.error:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module") def admin(): > tok, uid = _login(ADMIN_PHONE, "Admin") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:76: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
phone = '9999999999', name = 'Admin', roles = None
def _login(phone, name, roles=None): r = requests.post(f"{API}/auth/otp/send", json={"phone": phone}, timeout=15) > assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in 233 seconds."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:34: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_users_list_and_ban
testcase.error:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module") def admin(): > tok, uid = _login(ADMIN_PHONE, "Admin") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:76: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
phone = '9999999999', name = 'Admin', roles = None
def _login(phone, name, roles=None): r = requests.post(f"{API}/auth/otp/send", json={"phone": phone}, timeout=15) > assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in 233 seconds."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:34: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_cannot_ban_admin
testcase.error:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module") def admin(): > tok, uid = _login(ADMIN_PHONE, "Admin") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:76: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
phone = '9999999999', name = 'Admin', roles = None
def _login(phone, name, roles=None): r = requests.post(f"{API}/auth/otp/send", json={"phone": phone}, timeout=15) > assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in 233 seconds."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:34: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_add_role_never_admin
testcase.error:
@pytest.fixture(scope="module") def admin(): > tok, uid = _login(ADMIN_PHONE, "Admin") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:76: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
phone = '9999999999', name = 'Admin', roles = None
def _login(phone, name, roles=None): r = requests.post(f"{API}/auth/otp/send", json={"phone": phone}, timeout=15) > assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in 233 seconds."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:34: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_listing_takedown_and_restore
testcase.error:

backend/tests/test_phase4b.py:76: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
phone = '9999999999', name = 'Admin', roles = None
def _login(phone, name, roles=None): r = requests.post(f"{API}/auth/otp/send", json={"phone": phone}, timeout=15) > assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Too many OTP requests. Try again in 233 seconds."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
